Footer.disclaimer: Companion support only. Not medical, legal, or emergency services. No claim of 24/7 protection or guaranteed safety. By using 42 Guardians you acknowledge these limits.
Footer.disclaimerShort: This service is designed for practical local support and useful information. It does not replace medical, legal, or emergency services, and does not guarantee 24/7 protection.

Brand.description: 42 Guardians is a curated Seoul travel matching platform for K-drama, K-pop, and film fans — trust through verification, languages, and traveler reviews.

Home.metaDescription: Curated Seoul journeys for K-drama, K-pop, and film fans — 42 Guardians.
Home.heroTitle: Step into the Seoul scenes you loved
Home.heroLead: Bring the moods you saw in K-drama, K-pop, and K-movies to life in real Seoul — with trusted 42 Guardians at your side.
Home.heroCarouselSlide3: My Love from the Star · N Seoul Tower
Home.processClarity: We review every request before matching. Most handoffs within 1–2 days.
Home.trustBandLead: No surprises. Review scope before you book.
Home.regionsSectionTitle: First — where do you want to start?
Home.regionsSectionLead: 42 Guardians launches in Gwanghwamun and Gangnam first. Sharper experiences in verified launch areas.
Home.themesSectionTitle: Choose the mood of your trip
Home.themesSectionLead: You don’t need a show title — start from the vibe you want, and we’ll match guardians and posts.
Home.postsSectionLead: Curated insights and itineraries from guardians — build trust before you connect.
Home.trust42Lead: Verification, language fit, reviews, and response signals you can judge for yourself.
Home.trust42CardVerifiedDesc: Only guardians who pass ops review enter the matching pool.
Home.trust42CardLanguageDesc: Languages are explicit so expectations match upfront.
Home.trust42CardReviewsDesc: Real sessions and inquiries build reputation over time.
Home.trust42CardFastDesc: Guardians aim for reply windows that fit busy trips.
Home.reviewsSectionLead: Honest notes from people who wanted execution, not a lecture.
Home.aboutSectionLead: Built for international fans who fell in love with Korea through screens first.
Home.aboutSectionBody: We curate real Seoul moods and help you choose a local guardian by language and travel style. Launch is Gwanghwamun and Gangnam only — not nationwide.
Home.comingSectionLead: Busan and Jeju need more content and guardians before they go live. We’re not positioning as nationwide at launch.
Home.comingSectionNote: Region tiles marked “Opening later” can’t be selected or booked.
Home.signupSectionLead: Create an account to follow requests, saves, and alerts. (MVP: wiring soon)
Home.discoverSectionTitle: Signals from the ground, more useful than a brochure
Home.discoverSectionLead: Start with local posts and Guardian recommendations, then request human support only when you need it.
Home.featuredGuardiansSectionLead: Based on your area and travel mood, we surface local guardians who match right now.
Home.servicesSectionLead: Arrival, K-routes, first day — clear scope.
Home.howItWorksLead: Insights, reputation, and support stay connected.
Home.scopeNote: Not medical, legal, or emergency care. Check scope before booking.
Home.layersLead: Open participation for intel; separate verification for matching; external chat handoff in the MVP — clarity over hype.
Home.layer1Body: City tips and what you need right after landing — reviewed, not noisy.
Home.layer2Body: Trust comes from contributions and reviews — not volume alone.
Home.layer3Body: Reviewed matching first. Early handoffs use external channels you already use.
Home.sessionsLead: Arrival, K-routes, and first-day help — clear scope, practical support.

Services.metaDescription: Arrival, K-Route, and First 24 Hours companion support in Seoul.

Services.intro: Fixed-scope support sessions. Pricing shown is indicative for MVP planning — final quotes may vary by distance and timing.

arrival.title: Arrival Companion
arrival.shortDescription: From airport or station to your stay, make your first move easier.
bullets: Transit card, SIM, and first-trip setup
Check-in help and light local settling support

k_route.title: K-Route Companion
k_route.shortDescription: Get to the places you care about, with less friction along the way.
bullets: Help with ordering, navigation, and on-site communication

bullets: Help with apps, transit, food, and getting oriented

Explore.metaDescription: Region-based local intelligence — moderated, practical, Guardian-grounded.
Explore.heroTitle: Real local intelligence — before you book
Explore.heroDescription: Explore is curated for decisions: hot places, food queues, K-content execution, shopping mechanics, and practical arrival tips. Most insights come from Guardians with visible tiers and contribution history — not generic blog posts or open forums.
Explore.heroNote: We gather practical information for both Korean and international readers. The aim is Guardian-reviewed clarity — not machine translation.
Explore.regionSectionLead: Phase 1 metros first — structure ready for Phase 2 destinations.
Explore.featuredLead: Trusted locals and seed partners — highlighted for quality, not pay-to-play ads.
Explore.ctaLead: Browse intel first — then book scoped support or start contributing as a Guardian.
Explore.regionHubTagsLead: Filter posts below — same categories as the national Explore view.
Explore.moderationPreviewLead: Shown for ops alignment — travelers normally see approved posts only.
Explore.regionGuardiansLead: Active and verified tiers reflect contribution and separate verification — not hype.

Book.metaDescription: Request trusted local support — reviewed before matching.
Book.title: Request trusted local support
Book.intro: This is a calm, structured intake — not a one-click tour checkout. Share accurate context so we can match you thoughtfully. External chat is only introduced after our team approves scope and a Guardian fit.

TrustScope.title: Service scope and limits
TrustScope.lead: 42 Guardians focuses on practical local support and useful information. It is not a guided tour, medical or legal assistance, or an emergency-response service. By being clear about scope, we make the experience easier to trust.
included: City-based local insights and reviewed posts
Guardian reputation built through contributions and reviews
On-the-ground support for arrival, K-routes, and first 24 hours
External chat handoff after matching (Telegram, KakaoTalk, WhatsApp, etc.)
excluded: Promotional content or an unmoderated forum
Automatic matching rights based on post count alone
Support that replaces medical, legal, or emergency services
Built-in real-time chat during the MVP phase

AboutPage.metaDescription: Purpose, vision, direction, and manifesto — 42 Guardians for curated K-culture journeys in Seoul.
AboutPage.title: 42 Guardians
AboutPage.lead: A companion platform for fans of K-drama, K-pop, and Korean film who want Seoul as lived mood and scenes — not brochure checklists.
AboutPage.intro: We are not building a government-style portal or a marketplace of unlimited promises. Trust comes from verified local guardians, curated posts, and traveler reviews — so you can choose companionship by language, style, and proof.
AboutPage.sectionPurposeBody: If Korea drew you in through stories and sound, your trip is closer to atmosphere than landmark bingo. We honor that expectation and add local interpretation and routing so the journey continues in the real city.
AboutPage.sectionVisionBody: We want K-culture travelers to keep the feeling they already love while walking Seoul. Trust is built with transparent profiles, reviews, and clear ops standards — balancing speed with quality.
AboutPage.sectionDirectionBody: Launch stays focused on Gwanghwamun and Gangnam. Busan and Jeju are in preparation; we do not market nationwide coverage we cannot stand behind. We prefer depth in chosen cities over shallow breadth.
AboutPage.manifestoBody: We do not reduce traveler taste to data points alone. We do not treat guardians as interchangeable supply. Companionship only works when trust, language, and mood align — matching and curation are designed around that premise.
AboutPage.philosophyIntro: How we decide what to build and what to refuse.
AboutPage.philosophy1: Clear boundaries: we are not medical, legal, or emergency services; we do not promise 24/7 protection.
AboutPage.philosophy2: Verification and contribution: guardians earn trust through profiles, posts, and reviews; traveler feedback grounds quality.
AboutPage.philosophy3: Mood-first: start from the vibe you want, even if you do not know show titles — then find routes and companions.
AboutPage.philosophy4: Depth per place: density of experience in a city beats claiming everywhere at once.
AboutPage.serviceBody: Explore gathers regions, moods, and field insights. Guardians lists tiers, languages, response signals, and reviews side by side. Booking and request flows stay review-first to reduce vague promises and mismatched expectations.
